prestazioni: Engine swap to a naturally aspirated **1NZ-FE** (1.5L, 109hp stock) with a **Toda Racing 1NZ-FE stroker kit** (84mm crank, 86mm pistons, 10.5:1 compression) paired with **Toda Racing titanium valves, valve springs, and retainers** for high-RPM reliability (redline extended to 9,000 RPM). Forced induction via **Garrett GT2560R turbocharger** (0.63 A/R turbine housing) with a **GReddy Type-S intercooler** (front-mount, 600hp-rated) and **HKS SSQV4 blow-off valve** to prevent compressor surge. Fueling upgrades include **Denso 260cc/min injectors** (PN 23209-74010) and a **Walbro 255 LPH in-tank fuel pump** (PN F90000267) with an **AEM X-Series wideband AFR gauge** (PN 30-0300) for precise tuning.

Drivetrain reinforcement with a **Cusco Type-RS 1.5-way limited-slip differential** (80% lockup) and **Toyota Racing Development (TRD) 2-way LSD carrier bearings** (PN 41201-12040) to handle increased torque. Clutch upgrade to a **Spec Stage 3+ clutch kit** (ceramic-metallic, 6-puck) with a **Spec billet flywheel** (lightweight, 8.5lb) for rapid engagement. Transmission synchros replaced with **Toyota OEM carbon-fiber synchro rings** (PN 33351-20010) to prevent gear grind under high-RPM shifts.

Suspension overhaul with **Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers** (dual-flow valve, 30-way adjustable damping) and **Cusco front strut tower bar** (22mm diameter, 7000-series aluminum) to reduce chassis flex. Braking system upgraded to **Endless CC-R6 brake pads** (front) and **Project Mu 999.9 compound pads** (rear) with **Brembo 280mm 2-piece rotors** (slotted, 24mm thickness) and **AP Racing CP5210 calipers** (4-piston, radial-mount) for fade resistance. Wheels: **Work Emotion CR Kiwami** (15x7 +38 offset, 4x100 PCD) wrapped in **Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R** (195/50R15) for maximum mechanical grip.
estetica: Full **Tommy Kaira M19 aero kit** (fiberglass, OEM-fitment) including front lip, side skirts, and rear bumper diffuser with integrated **Seibon carbon-fiber rear wing** (250mm chord, 3D airfoil profile) for downforce. Hood replacement with a **JUN Auto carbon-fiber hood** (vented, 30% weight reduction) featuring **GReddy RS Race hood pins** (quick-release, anodized red).

Interior stripped and reinforced with a **Sparco Pro ADV racing seat** (FIA 8855-1999 certified, side-mount) and **Takata Drift III 4-point harness** (cam-lock, SFI 16.1 rated). Dashboard replaced with a **Defi Advance BF gauge cluster** (oil pressure, water temp, boost, and AFR) mounted on a **NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel hub** with a **Momo Mod.77 steering wheel** (350mm diameter, perforated leather).

Exterior lighting upgraded to **PIAA LP530 fog lights** (H3 bulb, 55W) and **Depo Racing JDM-style clear taillights** (LED, sequential turn signals). Paint: **PPG Toyota Super White II (040) basecoat** with **3M Matte Black vinyl wrap** (2080 series) on the roof, mirrors, and lower body panels for a stealth OEM+ look. Wheel finish: **Work Emotion CR Kiwami in Hyper Silver** with **Toyo Tires red lettering** for contrast.
